[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01111000 4
1 00001000 1
2 00001000 1
3 00000110 2
4 00000000 a
5 10000010 2
6 01100111 5
7 01010111 5

01 11111110 7
12 01111101 6
23 10011010 4
34 11101111 7
45 01010111 5 match 7
56 11111100 6
67 11111011 7
70 01011101 5
